stories.headline: Pakistan strike on Kabul drug rehabilitation centre: Families want answers
stories.description: There are calls to investigate the 16 March airstrike - which the UN says likely killed more - as a war crime.

stories.headline: What is happening with Keir Starmer’s leadership: at-a-glance
stories.description: The prime minister is fighting to stay on in No 10 as heavy election losses trigger a Labour revolt.

stories.headline: Social media becomes a ‘goldmine’ for fraudsters in Jordan
stories.description: Jordanians looking for a bargain are being scammed with false promises of cheap gold in a growing trend of online fraud.

stories.headline: Israeli military kills six in Lebanon, issues more displacement threats
stories.description: The deadly air attack comes just days before Israeli and Lebanese officials are due to meet in Washington.

stories.headline: Snack giant Calbee switches to black and white packaging as Iran war hits ink supplies
stories.description: The effective closure of the Strait of Hormuz has severely disrupted global supplies of energy and petrochemicals.
